title: Let's Forge Pirates
description: Pirate and Sailor armors and more
body:
Description:

This is an amateur mod that adds over twenty new armors and outfits to the Minecraft world with a pirate and maritime theme. It brings new customization and protection options to your character.

Features:

20+ Unique Armors and Outfits:Explore the diversity of pirate and maritime styles to give your character a distinctive look.

3-Tier Armors: Progress from a simple Sailor through an experienced Boatswain, all the way to a charismatic Captain. Each armor has three unique tiers, offering different levels of durability.

 

Check out the Review:

Small Ships:
The mod synergizes seamlessly with the Small Ships mod.

 

 



For Creators 

Modpack creators can freely add this mod to their packs without the need to ask. For YouTube showcase creators, I would appreciate it if you could send me a link to your videos.

Credits:

  • Creator: szczypikrul
  • Textures: witcherek01
  • Models: homohomik
